title: Commons
description: Commons provides a collaborative workspace where researchers can share cohort definitions, concept sets, analyses, and study packages across institutions and networks. Integration with Abby AI enables intelligent recommendations and discovery of community-contributed research assets.
tips: Search Commons before building new cohort definitions or concept sets to avoid duplicating work already contributed by the community.
Tag your shared assets with relevant therapeutic area and data model version metadata to improve discoverability.
Review the validation status and community ratings of shared cohorts before incorporating them into your own studies.
Use the Abby AI assistant to get recommendations for related community assets based on your current research context.
Contribute finalized, peer-reviewed study packages to Commons to increase the reproducibility and visibility of your research.
